title: Grocery Visualization
description: This project visualizes how grocery stores distribute food items according to processing level and price range. By analyzing grocery store data, we uncover how highly processed foods dominate shelves, especially in the lower price brackets.

title: Persuasive or Deceptive Visualization?
description: Creating visualizations for this proposition: Access to abortion clinics is essential for reducing out-of-state travel and improving healthcare equity.
